MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Plaintiff YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOC, is present. Represented by
Attorney JOSEPH URBANSKI, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant NICOLE MARTHE, is present.
Attorney TYLER MACMILLAHN, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem BARBARA ANSCHER, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 09, 2011 is vacated.
